expectations.text: Discovers and lists the skills found
expectations.evidence: Inventory table lists all 19 skills with agent system and availability
Uses plain language: 'Your skills are significantly above average', 'What's working well', 'What to improve'. B+ grade is intuitive. Minimal jargon.
All 19 skills have individual scorecards with 5-dimension scoring and verdict paragraphs
Prioritized recommendations table with P1/P2/P3 and effort estimates (1 min, 30 min, etc.)
Uses ad-hoc categories (Tool wrapper, Workflow, Behavioral, Meta/workflow, Domain knowledge) instead of the 9-category taxonomy from the skill's references
